assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Obtain GitGuardian access and complete a first secret scan with ggshield on a local Git repository, or confirm whether dashboard GitHub monitoring is the selected first mile.

first_success.outcome: ggshield has authenticated and completed a secret scan of the selected local repository, if the CLI route is selected.
first_success.observable_signal: The repository scan command exits with code 0 or 1 after completing the scan.

route_selection.surface: ggshield local repository scan versus dashboard GitHub integration
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: ggshield install, login, and local repo scan
candidates.reason: Account creation may use GitHub app install or email verification; exact login field path for CLI auth needs confirmation.

candidates.name: Dashboard signup with GitHub then integrate repositories
candidates.reason: Peer first-success via Internal Monitoring dashboard rather than local CLI scan.

required_path.action: Create a GitGuardian account via GitHub, email, or SSO.

required_fields.label: Signup method
required_fields.notes: GitHub social login, email/password, or SSO.

required_fields.label: GitHub App repository access when using GitHub signup
Email confirmation when using email signup

required_path.action: Install ggshield using the recommended install route.
required_path.observable_result: ggshield is available on the PATH.

required_path.action: Authenticate ggshield to the GitGuardian workspace.
Scan a local Git repository for secrets.

required_fields.label: ggshield secret scan repo command and repository path

required_path.observable_result: Scan completes with exit code 0 or 1.

prerequisites.description: A GitGuardian account or workspace is required for authenticated scanning.

external_gates.description: GitHub authorization when using GitHub signup or repository integration.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email confirmation for the email signup route.

platform_outcomes.description: GitGuardian returns scan findings or a clean completion status.

excluded.item: Reading reference overview pages beyond the scan command

uncertainties.question: Is first success the local ggshield repo scan or dashboard GitHub monitoring after signup?
uncertainties.impact: These are different terminals with different required actions.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Explicit first-success selection plus a fresh-account walkthrough for that route.

uncertainties.question: What exact ggshield authentication steps appear after account creation today?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Observed ggshield login against a fresh workspace.
